Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan &FilCidUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod Exit EndFor
//If &EmissaoEntrada = 'E' // &Periodo = 'EMISSÃO:' //Else &Periodo = 'DESPACHO/ENTRADA:' //EndIF
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'NOTAS EMITIDAS NO PERÍODO' print Cabecalho End
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true &AuxModCod = '' &index = 1 if &NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA or &NfeProTer.IsEmpty() &TipoNota = 'NOTAS PRÓPRIAS' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProTer, ModCod, NfeEntSai, NfeDtaFat, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeDtaFat >= &NfeDtaEms and NfeDtaFat <= &NfeDtaEms_to Where NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod When &NfeCliCod <> 0 // Where NfeCfoCod = &CfoCod When &CfoCod <> '' Where NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod when not &NfeLctCod.IsEmpty() Where NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Inutilizada Where NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA Where NfeLctAtuSal = &LctAtuSal when not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty() Where not NfeNum.IsEmpty()
&StatusVermelho = '' &StatusAzul = '' &StatusPreto = '' Do case CAse NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada &QtdCancelada += 1 &StatusVermelho = 'CAN.'
Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada &QtdDenegada += 1 &StatusVermelho = 'DEN.'
Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.autorizada &StatusAzul = 'AUT.' &QtdAutorizada += 1 Otherwise &StatusPreto = 'DIG.' &QtdDigitando += 1 EndCAse
if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &FilCodNom = FilCodRazSugg &IsImprimeCabecalho = false print Filtro print cabecalhoNotas EndIF
if &AuxModCod <> ModCod or &AuxNfeEntSai <> NfeEntSai If &index <> 1 If &ModNfeVlrTot >0 print TotalModelo EndIf
do 'ZeraModelo' EndIf
&AuxModCod = ModCod &AuxNfeEntSai = NfeEntSai &NcmSaiEnt = &AuxNfeEntSai.ToFormattedString() &index = 2
&VarcharTituloModelo = 'NOTAS MODELO:' + trim(ModCod) if NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &VarcharTituloModelo += ' #ENTRADA' &IsTemEntrada = true Else &VarcharTituloModelo += ' #SAÍDA' &IsTemSaida = true EndiF
print Modelo EndIF &NcmSaiEnt = &AuxNfeEntSai.ToFormattedString() &SoNumeros = padL(trim(str(NfeNum)), 9, '0') &AuxNfeNum = substr(&SoNumeros, 1, 3) +'.' + substr(&SoNumeros, 4, 3) + '.' + substr(&SoNumeros, 7, 3) &NfeCod = NfeCod
&NfeSts = NfeSts print Nota NoSkip
&NfeCliCidUF = NfeCliCidUF &AuxCfoCod = ''
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProTer, ModCod, NfeEntSai, NfeDtaFat, NfeCod, NfeCfoCod
If &AuxCfoCod <> NfeCfoCod If &AuxCfoCod <> '' Print CfopNota &QtdItem = 0 If &ItensCFOP > 0 do 'TotaisNotas' do 'LimpaTotaisNota' EndIF EndIf EndIF
// ipi (45,98) (produtos 1149,47) = 1195,45
&NfeVlrTot += (NfeProVlrTot + NfeProVlrImcsSt + NfeProVlrIpi + NfeProVlrFrt + NfeProVlrOutDsp) - (NfeProVlrDsc+NfeProVlrIcmsDes) &NfeVlrTotPro += round(((NfeProQtd * NfeProVlrUnt) - NfeProVlrDsc), 2)
If NfeSts = Status_NFe.autorizada &ModNfeVlrTot += (NfeProVlrTot + NfeProVlrImcsSt + NfeProVlrIpi + NfeProVlrFrt + NfeProVlrOutDsp) - (NfeProVlrDsc+NfeProVlrIcmsDes) &ModNfeVlrTotPro += round(((NfeProQtd * NfeProVlrUnt) - NfeProVlrDsc), 2) EndIf
If NfeProVlrIcms <> 0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcms += NfeProBasIcms &NfeVlrTotIcms += NfeProVlrIcms &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcms += NfeProBasIcms &ModNfeVlrTotIcms += NfeProVlrIcms EndIF
If NfeProVlrImcsSt <> 0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += NfeProBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt +=NfeProVlrImcsSt &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += NfeProBasIcmsSt &ModNfeVlrTotIcmsSt +=NfeProVlrImcsSt EndIF &NfeVlrTotIpi += NfeProVlrIpi &ModNfeVlrTotIpi += NfeProVlrIpi
if NfeProVlrIpi > 0 &NfeCfoCod = NfeCfoCod &NcmCod = NfeNcmCod
&AuxNfeProVlrIpi = NfeProVlrIpi &IpiValorBaseMoeda = 0
if NfeProBasIpi > 0 &IpiValorBaseMoeda = NfeProBasIpi Else &IpiValorBaseMoeda = NfeProBasIpi EndIf
do 'AddSDTIpi' Endif &ItensCFOP += 1 &AuxCfoCod = NfeCfoCod EndFor
If &ItensCFOP > 0 print CfopNota do 'TotaisNotas' do 'LimpaTotaisNota' EndIF EndFor
If &ModNfeVlrTot > 0 print TotalModelo EndIf
do 'ZeraModelo' print TotalNotas
If &QtdCancelada > 0 print TotalCanceladas EndIF
if &QtdDenegada > 0 Print TotalDenegadas EndiF
if &QtdDigitando > 0 print TotalDigitando EndiF
do 'PrintTotalCFOP'
do 'PrintTotalUF'
do 'PrintTotaisIPI'
&IsImprimeTitulo= true //NOTAS INUTILIZADAS For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProTer, ModCod, NfeNum Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeDtaFat >= &NfeDtaEms and NfeDtaFat <= &NfeDtaEms_to Where NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod When &NfeCliCod <> 0 Where NfeSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada Where NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA Where not NfeNum.IsEmpty()
&NfeSer = NfeSer &NfeNum = NfeNum &ModCod = ModCod do 'getProtocolo'
if &IsImprimeTitulo= true &IsImprimeTitulo= false print tituloInutilizacoes EndIF print Inutilizacao EndFor Endif
//TERCEIROS if &NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS or &NfeProTer.IsEmpty() &TipoNota = 'NOTAS TERCEIROS' &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &AuxModCod = '' &sdtCFOP.Clear() &sdtUF.Clear()
&CanceladaNfeVlrTot.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotPro.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotBasIcms.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIcms.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIpi.SetEmpty()
&DenegadaNfeVlrTot.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotPro.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotBasIcms.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIcms.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIpi.SetEmpty()
&DigitandoNfeVlrTot.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotPro.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotBasIcms.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIcms.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIpi.SetEmpty()
&AutorizadaNfeVlrTot.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotPro.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotBasIcms.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIcms.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIpi.SetEmpty()
&NfeVlrTot.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotPro.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotBasIcms.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotIcms.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt.SetEmpty() &NfeVlrTotIpi.SetEmpty()
do 'ZeraModelo' if &NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA or &NfeProTer.IsEmpty() eject Endif &index = 1 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProTer, ModCod, NfeLctCod, NfeEntSai, NfeDtaFat, NfeCod
Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeDtaFat >= &NfeDtaEms and NfeDtaFat <= &NfeDtaEms_to Where NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod When &NfeCliCod <> 0 // Where NfeCfoCod = &CfoCod When &CfoCod <> '' Where NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod when not &NfeLctCod.IsEmpty() Where NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Inutilizada Where NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS Where NfeLctAtuSal = &LctAtuSal when not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty() Where not NfeNum.IsEmpty()
&StatusVermelho = '' &StatusAzul = '' &StatusPreto = '' Do case CAse NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada &QtdCancelada += 1 &StatusVermelho = 'CAN.' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada &QtdDenegada += 1 &StatusVermelho = 'DEN.'
Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.autorizada &StatusAzul = 'AUT.' &QtdAutorizada += 1 Otherwise &StatusPreto = 'DIG.' &QtdDigitando += 1 EndCAse
if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &FilCodNom = FilCodRazSugg &IsImprimeCabecalho = false print Filtro print cabecalhoNotas EndIF
if &AuxModCod <> ModCod or &AuxNfeEntSai <> NfeEntSai If &index <> 1 IF &ModNfeVlrTot > 0 print TotalModelo EndIf do 'ZeraModelo' EndIf
&index = 2
&VarcharTituloModelo = 'NOTAS MODELO:' + trim(ModCod) if NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &VarcharTituloModelo += ' #ENTRADA #NotasDeTerceiros' &IsTemEntrada = true Else &VarcharTituloModelo += ' #SAÍDA #NotasDeTerceiros' &IsTemSaida = true EndiF
print Modelo EndIF
if &AuxModCod <> ModCod or &AuxNfeEntSai <> NfeEntSai or &AuxLctCod <> NfeLctCod If &AuxLctCod <> 0 Print TotalTipoLancamento
&LCtNfeVlrTot = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotBasIcms = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotIcms = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotIpi = 0 &LCtNfeVlrTotPro = 0 Endif
&VarcharTipoLancamento = trim(str(NfeLctCod)) + ' - ' + trim(NfeLctNom) Print Tipolancamento Endif
&AuxModCod = ModCod &AuxNfeEntSai = NfeEntSai &NcmSaiEnt = &AuxNfeEntSai.ToFormattedString() &AuxLctCod = NfeLctCod
&SoNumeros = padL(trim(str(NfeNum)), 9, '0') &AuxNfeNum = substr(&SoNumeros, 1, 3) +'.' + substr(&SoNumeros, 4, 3) + '.' + substr(&SoNumeros, 7, 3) &NfeCod = NfeCod
&NfeSts = NfeSts print Nota NoSkip
&NfeCliCidUF = NfeCliCidUF &AuxCfoCod = ''
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProTer, ModCod, NfeLctCod, NfeEntSai, NfeDtaFat, NfeCod, NfeCfoCod If &AuxCfoCod <> NfeCfoCod If &AuxCfoCod <> '' Print CfopNota
If &ItensCFOP > 0 do 'TotaisNotas' do 'LimpaTotaisNota' EndIF EndIf EndIF
&NfeVlrTot += (NfeProVlrTot + NfeProVlrImcsSt + NfeProVlrIpi + NfeProVlrFrt + NfeProVlrOutDsp) - (NfeProVlrDsc+NfeProVlrIcmsDes) &NfeVlrTotPro += round(((NfeProQtd * NfeProVlrUnt) - NfeProVlrDsc), 2) &LCtNfeVlrTot += (NfeProVlrTot + NfeProVlrImcsSt + NfeProVlrIpi + NfeProVlrFrt + NfeProVlrOutDsp) - (NfeProVlrDsc+NfeProVlrIcmsDes) &LCtNfeVlrTotPro += round(((NfeProQtd * NfeProVlrUnt) - NfeProVlrDsc), 2)
If NfeSts = Status_NFe.autorizada &ModNfeVlrTot += (NfeProVlrTot + NfeProVlrImcsSt + NfeProVlrIpi + NfeProVlrFrt + NfeProVlrOutDsp) - (NfeProVlrDsc+NfeProVlrIcmsDes) &ModNfeVlrTotPro += round(((NfeProQtd * NfeProVlrUnt) - NfeProVlrDsc), 2) EndIf
If NfeProVlrIcms <> 0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcms += NfeProBasIcms &LCtNfeVlrTotBasIcms += NfeProBasIcms &NfeVlrTotIcms += NfeProVlrIcms &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcms += NfeProBasIcms &ModNfeVlrTotIcms += NfeProVlrIcms &LCtNfeVlrTotIcms += NfeProVlrIcms EndIF
If NfeProVlrImcsSt <> 0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += NfeProBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt +=NfeProVlrImcsSt &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += NfeProBasIcmsSt &ModNfeVlrTotIcmsSt +=NfeProVlrImcsSt &LCtNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += NfeProBasIcmsSt &LCtNfeVlrTotIcmsSt += NfeProVlrImcsSt EndIF &NfeVlrTotIpi += NfeProVlrIpi &ModNfeVlrTotIpi += NfeProVlrIpi &LCtNfeVlrTotIpi += NfeProVlrIpi &ItensCFOP += 1 &AuxCfoCod = NfeCfoCod EndFor
If &ItensCFOP > 0 print CfopNota do 'TotaisNotas' do 'LimpaTotaisNota' EndIF
EndFor
if &LCtNfeVlrTot <> 0 print TotalTipoLancamento Endif
If &ModNfeVlrTot > 0 print TotalModelo EndIf Do 'ZeraModelo'
print TotalNotas
If &QtdCancelada > 0 print TotalCanceladas EndIF
if &QtdDenegada > 0 Print TotalDenegadas EndiF
if &QtdDigitando > 0 print TotalDigitando EndiF
&Mensagem = ' #NotasDeTerceiros' do 'PrintTotalCFOP' do 'PrintTotalUF' Endif
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'AddSDTIpi'
if &NfeSts = status_Nfe.Autorizada &IsAchouIpi = false For &SdtNcmIpiItem in &SdtNcmIpi if &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmCod = &NcmCod and &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmSaiEnt = &NcmSaiEnt //and &SdtNcmIpiItem.CfoCod = &NfeCfoCod &IsAchouIpi = true &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorMoeda += &AuxNfeProVlrIpi &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorBaseMoeda += &IpiValorBaseMoeda Exit EndIf EndFor
if &IsAchouIpi = false &SdtNcmIpiItem = new() &SdtNcmIpiItem.CfoCod = &NfeCfoCod &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmCod = &NcmCod &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmSaiEnt = &NcmSaiEnt &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorMoeda = &AuxNfeProVlrIpi &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorBaseMoeda = &IpiValorBaseMoeda
&SdtNcmIpi.Add(&SdtNcmIpiItem) Endif
Endif EndSub
Sub 'PrintTotaisIPI' &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &AuxNfeProVlrIpi = 0 &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS IPI - POR NCM. #ENTRADA' For &SdtNcmIpiItem in &SdtNcmIpi if &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmSaiEnt = 'E'
if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &IsImprimeCabecalho = false print TituloIpi Endif
&AuxNfeProVlrIpi = &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorMoeda &IpiValorBaseMoeda = &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorBaseMoeda &NcmCod = &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmCod &TotalBaseIpiMoeda += &IpiValorBaseMoeda &TotalIpiMoeda += &AuxNfeProVlrIpi print printIPI EndIf EndFor
if &TotalIpiMoeda > 0 print totalIPI Endif
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true &AuxNfeProVlrIpi = 0 &TotalIpiMoeda = 0 &TotalBaseIpiMoeda = 0 &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS IPI - POR NCM. #SAIDA' For &SdtNcmIpiItem in &SdtNcmIpi if &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmSaiEnt = 'S'
if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &IsImprimeCabecalho = false print TituloIpi Endif
&AuxNfeProVlrIpi = &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorMoeda &IpiValorBaseMoeda = &SdtNcmIpiItem.IpiValorBaseMoeda &NcmCod = &SdtNcmIpiItem.NcmCod &TotalBaseIpiMoeda += &IpiValorBaseMoeda &TotalIpiMoeda += &AuxNfeProVlrIpi print printIPI EndIf EndFor
if &TotalIpiMoeda > 0 print totalIPI Endif
EndSub
Sub 'printTotalUF' //POR ESTADO ENTRADA &sdtUF.Sort('UfeCod') &ValorTotalCfop()= 0 &QtdNotasCfop = 0 if &IsTemEntrada = true &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS POR UF - AUTORIZADAS. #ENTRADA' + &Mensagem print TotaisporUF For &sdtUFItem in &sdtUF If &sdtUFItem.UfeCod <> &FilCidUfeCod and &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &Count += 1 &NfeVlrTot = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtUFItem.UfeNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas
&ValorTotalCfop(1,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro &ValorTotalCfop(1,8) += &QtdAutorizada print ItemUF EndIF EndFor
if &Count > 1 &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(1,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) &QtdNotasCfop = &ValorTotalCfop(1,8) print TotalUF EndiF
For &sdtUFItem in &sdtUF If &sdtUFItem.UfeCod = &FilCidUfeCod and &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &CountPR += 1 &NfeVlrTot = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtUFItem.UfeNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas
&ValorTotalCfop(1,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro &ValorTotalCfop(1,8) += &QtdAutorizada print ItemUF EndIF EndFor
if &CountPR > 1 or (&CountPR > 0 and &Count > 0) &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(1,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) &QtdNotasCfop = &ValorTotalCfop(1,8) print TotalUF EndIF Endif
if &IsTemSaida = true &Count = 0 &CountPR = 0 &QtdNotasCfop = 0 &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS POR UF - AUTORIZADAS. #SAIDA' + &Mensagem print TotaisporUF For &sdtUFItem in &sdtUF If &sdtUFItem.UfeCod <> &FilCidUfeCod and &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &Count += 1 &NfeVlrTot = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtUFItem.UfeNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas
&ValorTotalCfop(2,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro &ValorTotalCfop(2,8) += &QtdAutorizada print ItemUF EndIF EndFor
if &Count > 1 &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(2,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) &QtdNotasCfop = &ValorTotalCfop(2,8) print TotalUF EndiF
For &sdtUFItem in &sdtUF If &sdtUFItem.UfeCod = &FilCidUfeCod and &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &CountPR += 1 &NfeVlrTot = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtUFItem.UfeNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas
&ValorTotalCfop(2,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro &ValorTotalCfop(2,8) += &QtdAutorizada print ItemUF EndIF EndFor
if &CountPR > 1 or (&CountPR > 0 and &Count > 0) &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(2,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) &QtdNotasCfop = &ValorTotalCfop(2,8) print TotalUF Endif Endif
if &IsTemEntrada = true and &IsTemSaida = true &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(2,1) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) &QtdNotasCfop = &ValorTotalCfop(2,8) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,8) &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAL UF:' print TotalGeralUF Endif EndSub
sub 'printTotalCFOP' &sdtCFOP.Sort('CfoCod') &ValorTotalCfop()= 0 if &IsTemEntrada = true &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS POR CFOP - AUTORIZADAS. #ENTRADA' + &Mensagem print TotaisPorCFOP
For &sdtCFOPItem in &sdtCFOP if &sdtCFOPItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &NfeVlrTot = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtCFOPItem.CfoNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtCFOPItem.QtdNotas
&QtdNotasCfop += &QtdAutorizada
&ValorTotalCfop(1,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro
print ItemCfop EndiF EndFor
&CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(1,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) print TotaisCfo EndiF
if &IsTemSaida = true &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAIS POR CFOP - AUTORIZADAS. #SAÍDA' + &Mensagem print TotaisPorCFOP
For &sdtCFOPItem in &sdtCFOP
if &sdtCFOPItem.NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida
&NfeVlrTot = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcms = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotPro = &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotPro &AuxCfoNom = &sdtCFOPItem.CfoNom &QtdAutorizada = &sdtCFOPItem.QtdNotas
&QtdNotasCfop += &QtdAutorizada
&ValorTotalCfop(2,1) += &NfeVlrTot &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) += &NfeVlrTotIcms &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) += &NfeVlrTotIpi &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) += &NfeVlrTotPro
print ItemCfop EndiF EndFor
&CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(2,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) print TotaisCfo Endif
if &IsTemEntrada = true and &IsTemSaida = true &CfoNfeVlrTot = &ValorTotalCfop(2,1) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,1) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,2) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,2) &CfoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,3) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,3) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcms = &ValorTotalCfop(2,4) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,4) &CfoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &ValorTotalCfop(2,5) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,5) &CfoNfeVlrTotIpi = &ValorTotalCfop(2,6) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,6) &CfoNfeVlrTotPro = &ValorTotalCfop(2,7) + &ValorTotalCfop(1,7) &VarcharTituloModelo = 'TOTAL CFOP:' print GeralCFOP Endif EndSUb
sub 'GetProtocolo' &FilInuDhRec.SetEmpty() &FilInuProt.SetEmpty() &FilInuSer = val(&NfeSer) For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FilInuSer, FilInuMod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FilInuSer = &FilInuSer Where FilInuNroIni <= &NfeNum and FilInuNroFin >= &NfeNum Where FilInuMod = &ModCod &FilInuDhRec = FilInuDhRec &FilInuProt = FilInuProt Exit
EndFor EndSub
Sub 'TotaisNotas' Do Case Case &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada &CanceladaNfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &CanceladaNfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro &CanceladaNfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &CanceladaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &CanceladaNfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi
Case &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada &DenegadaNfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &DenegadaNfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro &DenegadaNfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &DenegadaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &DenegadaNfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi
Case &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando &DigitandoNfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &DigitandoNfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro &DigitandoNfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &DigitandoNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &DigitandoNfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi
Otherwise //Case &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada &AutorizadaNfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &AutorizadaNfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi
//TOTAL CFOP &IsAchou = false For &sdtCFOPItem in &sdtCFOP If &AuxCfoCod = &sdtCFOPItem.CfoCod and &sdtCFOPItem.NfeEntSai = &AuxNfeEntSai &IsAchou = true
&sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro
&sdtCFOPItem.QtdNotas += 1
Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = false For Each Order CfoCod Where CfoCod = &AuxCfoCod &AuxCfoNom = CfoNom Exit EndFor
&sdtCFOPItem = new() &sdtCFOPItem.CfoCod = &AuxCfoCod &sdtCFOPItem.NfeEntSai = &AuxNfeEntSai &sdtCFOPItem.CfoNom = &AuxCfoNom &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcms = &NfeVlrTotIcms &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotIpi = &NfeVlrTotIpi &sdtCFOPItem.NfeVlrTotPro = &NfeVlrTotPro &sdtCFOPItem.QtdNotas = 1 &sdtCFOP.Add(&sdtCFOPItem) EndIf
//TOTAL UF &IsAchou = false For &sdtUFItem in &sdtUF If &sdtUFItem.UfeCod = &NfeCliCidUF and &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = &AuxNfeEntSai &IsAchou = true &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot += &NfeVlrTot &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms += &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms += &NfeVlrTotIcms &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt += &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi += &NfeVlrTotIpi &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro += &NfeVlrTotPro &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas += 1
Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = false For Each order EmpCod, UfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where UfeCod = &NfeCliCidUF &UfeNom = UfeNom Exit EndFor
&sdtUFItem = new() &sdtUFItem.UfeCod = &NfeCliCidUF &sdtUFItem.NfeEntSai = &AuxNfeEntSai &sdtUFItem.UfeNom = &UfeNom &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcms = &NfeVlrTotIcms &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotIpi = &NfeVlrTotIpi &sdtUFItem.NfeVlrTotPro = &NfeVlrTotPro &sdtUFItem.QtdNotas = 1 &sdtUF.Add(&sdtUFItem) EndIf EndCase EndSub
sub 'LimpaTotaisNota' &NfeVlrTot = 0 &NfeVlrTotPro = 0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcms =0 &NfeVlrTotIcms =0 &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt =0 &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt =0 &NfeVlrTotIpi = 0 EndSub
Sub 'ZeraModelo' &ModNfeVlrTot = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotPro = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcms = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotIcms = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotIcmsSt = 0 &ModNfeVlrTotIpi = 0 EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!

Part.Source:
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&NfeDtaEms, in:&NfeDtaEms_to, in:&NfeCliCod, in:&CfoCod, in:&NfeProTer, in:&AgruparTipoLancamento, in:&LctAtuSal, in:&NfeLctCod);
output_File(&Pgmname, 'PDF');
